_comment: Model ids are exact opaque strings — use the id your proxy or runtime expects. To discover available ids: check your proxy's /v1/models endpoint, the admin UI, or run `claude models` in Claude Code.
_comment_provider: base_url / api_key_env / redqueen_tier are OPTIONAL. They let killhouse drive an OpenAI-compatible external provider (e.g. fireworks.ai) when killhouse invokes redqueen. api_key_env NAMES the env var holding the token — the secret itself stays in the environment, never in this file. Omit these three for current-model-only routing.
